title: [CI] Most tests fail on Ubuntu 18.04
body:
I have a Docker-based repro: https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/crashes-1804/utils/run-docker-1804.sh. Just run `./utils/run-docker-1804.sh`. This is running the LLVM build in the release config w/ asserts enabled and CIRCT in debug. I've attached a log of the crashes: [test_fails.log](https://github.com/llvm/circt/files/6495753/test_fails.log).


